data.title: Kingfisher Publishes 2025/26 Annual Report Ahead of AGM
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

The latest announcement is out from Kingfisher ( (GB:KGF) ).

Kingfisher has published its Annual Report and Accounts for the financial year ended 31 January 2026 on its corporate website, with a copy also submitted to the UK’s National Storage Mechanism for public inspection. The company will distribute hard copies of the report and the 2026 AGM notice to shareholders who have opted for paper communications around 14 April, while making the AGM materials available to other investors online the same day, ensuring broad access to its regulated financial and governance disclosures.

The regulated information required under UK disclosure rules is contained in full within the Annual Report, which can be accessed via the company’s website and the FCA’s storage platform. This publication marks a key step in Kingfisher’s annual reporting cycle, providing investors and stakeholders with detailed insights into its performance and governance ahead of the forthcoming annual general meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:KGF) stock is a Hold with a £295.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kingfisher stock, see the GB:KGF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KGF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KGF is a Neutral.

The score is supported by strong cash generation and attractive valuation (very low P/E and solid dividend yield), reinforced by generally constructive guidance and execution progress from the latest call. These positives are tempered by weakened profitability versus 2022 and poor technical conditions (downtrend and weak momentum).

To see Spark’s full report on KGF stock, click here.

More about Kingfisher

Kingfisher is a UK-listed home improvement retail group, operating multiple brands and formats focused on DIY, trade customers and building supplies. The company serves consumers and professional customers across its store network and online platforms, with a market focus on home renovation and maintenance products.

data.title: Launch Tech Sets AGM to Approve 2025 Results, Dividend and Share Buy-back Mandate
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Launch Tech Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2488) ).

Launch Tech Company Limited has called its annual general meeting for 24 April 2026 in Shenzhen, where shareholders will review the directors’ report, approve the 2025 audited financial statements and consider reappointing Da Hua Certified Public Accountants as independent auditor. The meeting will also vote on renewing the terms of key executive and non-executive directors, authorizing new service contracts, approving a cash dividend of RMB0.41 per share for 2025 and granting the board a general mandate to repurchase up to 10% of the company’s H shares, subject to regulatory and creditor-related conditions.

These resolutions, if approved, will reinforce continuity in Launch Tech’s leadership and governance, return cash to shareholders through the proposed dividend and provide the board with additional flexibility to manage capital structure via share buy-backs. The package of decisions is likely to affect shareholder returns, balance sheet management and the company’s positioning in the Hong Kong market, while aligning corporate actions with regulatory requirements in both the PRC and Hong Kong.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2488) stock is a Buy with a HK$9.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Launch Tech Co. Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:2488 Stock Forecast page.

More about Launch Tech Co. Ltd. Class H

Launch Tech Company Limited is a China-incorporated joint stock company listed in Hong Kong that operates in the technology and industrial equipment sector. The company focuses on research, development and manufacturing activities at its Shenzhen industrial park, serving domestic and international markets through its H-share listing structure.

Average Trading Volume: 606,656

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$3.45B

data.title: African Gold Director Silvia Bottero Sells Entire Shareholding in Off-Market Deal
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

African Gold Ltd. ( (AU:A1G) ) has issued an announcement.

African Gold Ltd has disclosed that director Silvia Bottero has sold her entire direct holding of 2,073,880 ordinary shares in the company. The off-market transaction, completed on 30 March 2026, realised consideration of about $1.83 million and leaves Bottero with no remaining securities in African Gold, signaling a complete exit from her equity position.

The company reported that the trade did not occur during a closed period requiring prior written clearance. The notice, lodged with the ASX under director interest disclosure rules, informs investors of the significant change in board-level share ownership, which may influence market perceptions of governance alignment and insider confidence.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:A1G) stock is a Sell with a A$0.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on African Gold Ltd. stock, see the AU:A1G Stock Forecast page.

More about African Gold Ltd.

African Gold Ltd is an Australia-listed mining company focused on the exploration and development of gold assets. The company operates in the precious metals sector, aiming to create value through gold resource discovery and potential production in relevant mining jurisdictions.

Hunting ( (GB:HTG) ) just unveiled an update.

Hunting PLC has confirmed that, as of 31 March 2026, its issued share capital consists of 153,344,637 ordinary shares of 25 pence each, with no shares held in treasury. This updated total follows the cancellation of shares repurchased under the company’s buy-back programme and serves as the new reference figure for investors assessing disclosure thresholds under U.K. transparency rules.

The announcement ensures shareholders have an accurate denominator for calculating whether they must notify holdings or changes in holdings in line with FCA requirements. By clarifying its current voting rights structure, Hunting provides improved transparency to the market and supports regulatory compliance for investors monitoring their stakes in the precision engineering group.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HTG) stock is a Buy with a £580.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hunting stock, see the GB:HTG Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HTG is a Outperform.

The score is driven mainly by improved operating performance and strong balance-sheet resilience, reinforced by positive FY26 guidance, a sizeable tender pipeline, and ongoing buybacks/dividend growth plans. Offsetting this are cash-flow volatility (notably the 2025 free-cash-flow decline), order-book visibility near-term, and only moderate valuation support for a cyclical business.

To see Spark’s full report on HTG stock, click here.

Hunting PLC is a global precision engineering group that supplies precision-manufactured equipment and premium services to customers worldwide. Listed on the London Stock Exchange in the Equity Shares in Commercial Companies category, the company is headquartered in London with a corporate office in Houston and operations across the U.K., China, India, Indonesia, Mexico, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, the UAE and the U.S.

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from D&G Technology Holding Company Limited ( (HK:1301) ).

D&G Technology Holding has revised and approved updated terms of reference for its nomination committee, effective 27 March 2026. The committee must comprise at least three directors with a majority being independent non-executive directors and must include at least one director of a different gender.

The document formalizes rules on membership, chairmanship, secretarial support, meeting frequency, notice periods, quorum, voting procedures, and written resolutions for the nomination committee. These changes aim to strengthen corporate governance, ensure diversity in board composition, and clarify operational procedures for director nomination and selection oversight.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1301) stock is a Sell with a HK$0.31 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on D&G Technology Holding Company Limited stock, see the HK:1301 Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Ciprun Technology Partners with 01.AI to Build AI-Driven Intellectual Property Services
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited ( (HK:1020) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Ciprun Technology Holdings Company Limited has entered into a strategic memorandum of cooperation with Beijing Lingyiwanwu Information Technology Co., Ltd. (01.AI), an artificial intelligence firm specializing in large model technologies and AI application systems. The partnership aims to merge Ciprun’s intellectual property expertise with 01.AI’s AI capabilities to develop new technology-driven service models in the IP field.

Under the memorandum, the parties will collaborate on AI-based analysis of intellectual property rights, including intelligent patent retrieval, infringement risk warning and high-value patent screening. They will also explore automating IP processes such as application examination and document tracking, apply AI to IP asset valuation and transaction matching, and potentially co-develop sector-specific AI tools, with the goal of creating a new big data platform for intellectual property and strengthening both companies’ positions in the evolving IP and AI markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1020) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.49 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited stock, see the HK:1020 Stock Forecast page.

More about Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited

Ciprun Technology Holdings Company Limited, formerly known as Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited, is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and operates through subsidiaries as an intellectual property agency and transaction services provider. The Group focuses on professional services around intellectual property rights, including patent-related advisory and facilitation of IP-related business activities.

Average Trading Volume: 23,959,983

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$1.95B

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Access Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4813) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ACCESS CO., LTD. has announced corrections to previously disclosed figures related to non-operating income and expenses, and differences between consolidated and non-consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ended January 2026. The revisions stem from updated data reflected in its corrected consolidated financial results announced on March 30, 2026.

The company has lowered the amount of bad debt loss and allowance for doubtful accounts on loans to its U.S., European, and Taiwanese subsidiaries in its non-consolidated accounts from ¥3,871 million to ¥2,591 million, while confirming there is no impact on consolidated results. It also revised non-consolidated performance figures, showing fiscal 2026 net sales of ¥9,359 million, an ordinary loss of ¥2,538 million, and a reduced net loss of ¥3,503 million, narrowing the deficit versus the previously stated numbers and clarifying its standalone financial position for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4813) stock is a Sell with a Yen551.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Access Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:4813 Stock Forecast page.

The company develops and provides software and network solutions, with a focus on internet, mobile, and embedded platforms for global markets including the U.S., Europe, and Asia.

data.title: Eagle Eye Confirms Leahy Family Trust Share Reorganisation With Stake Unchanged
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Eagle Eye Solutions ( (GB:EYE) ) has issued an update.

Eagle Eye Solutions has disclosed an internal share reorganisation involving non-executive director Sir Terry Leahy and his wife, Lady Alison Leahy, who have transferred portions of their Eagle Eye shareholdings into family discretionary settlement trusts. The transactions, executed off-market at nil consideration, leave the family’s total beneficial interest unchanged at 2,457,006 shares, or 8.23% of the company’s issued share capital, signalling no immediate shift in control or strategic direction for shareholders.

The announcement formalises a restructuring of ownership among Sir Terry, Lady Alison and their associated trusts rather than a disposal or new acquisition of shares. For investors, the move is primarily administrative in nature, clarifying the internal allocation of a significant existing stake while maintaining the family’s long-term alignment with Eagle Eye’s growth in AI-driven marketing and enterprise loyalty solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:EYE) stock is a Buy with a £344.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eagle Eye Solutions stock, see the GB:EYE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EYE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EYE is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (robust growth and low leverage) and positive technical momentum. These strengths are offset by overbought technical signals and a demanding valuation (high P/E), which together raise near-term risk and limit upside implied by fundamentals alone.

To see Spark’s full report on EYE stock, click here.

More about Eagle Eye Solutions

Eagle Eye Solutions Group PLC is a leading provider of applied AI for marketing, delivering personalised, real-time customer engagement at scale for retail, travel and hospitality brands worldwide. Its cloud-native, API-based platform powers large-scale loyalty and promotions programmes, executing more than 1 billion personalised offers weekly and managing over 700 million loyalty wallets for major clients including Tesco, Carrefour, Woolworths Group and others.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

The latest update is out from Park Medi World Limited ( (IN:PARKHOSPS) ).

Park Medi World Limited has submitted to the stock exchanges the necessary compliance certificates under Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company’s registrar, Kfin Technologies, confirmed that all details of shares dematerialised or rematerialised during the period have been duly provided to the exchanges, underscoring the company’s adherence to regulatory reporting standards and maintaining transparency for investors.

These filings indicate continued alignment with depository and listing requirements, which is important for safeguarding shareholder interests and ensuring smooth settlement of trades in the company’s securities. By keeping its records updated with the depositories and exchanges, Park Medi World supports orderly market operations in its shares and reinforces its compliance track record in India’s capital markets.

More about Park Medi World Limited

Park Medi World Limited, which trades under the symbol PARKHOSPS, is a listed company operating in the healthcare and hospital services sector. Its equity shares are listed on both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India, with Kfin Technologies Limited acting as its registrar and share transfer agent for securities-related services.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Symphony International Holdings ( (GB:SIHL) ) just unveiled an update.

Symphony International Holdings has called its annual general meeting for 29 April 2026 in Singapore, where shareholders will receive the annual report and financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025. The meeting will also consider an ordinary resolution renewing the company’s authority to make market purchases of up to 14.99% of its own shares at prices tied to prevailing market values.

The proposed buyback mandate, which would run until the next annual general meeting, gives the board additional flexibility to manage the capital structure and respond to any discount between the share price and underlying asset value. Detailed instructions are set out for shareholders and depository interest holders on appointing proxies, using the CREST system, and obtaining representation to vote, underscoring the company’s efforts to facilitate broad investor participation.

More about Symphony International Holdings

Symphony International Holdings is an investment company listed in London that focuses on private equity-style investments across Asia. The firm typically targets consumer-related sectors and growth businesses in the region, aiming to create long-term value through active portfolio management and selective capital allocation.
